chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1057 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنْ تَكَلَّمْتَ أَوْ صَرَفْتَ وَجْهَكَ عَنِ اَلْقِبْلَةِ فَأَعِدِ اَلصَّلاَةَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1057 - In the narration of Abu Basir from Imam (as),
Imam (as) said: "If you speak or turn your face away from the qibla, then you should repeat the prayer."
